channel.title: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists
channel.description:
Hi, I'm using mars theme as base. I would like to display sticky posts on top of the list. As we have pagination, how would i get the sticky posts ?
Thanks, Vimal Madhavan

item.title: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists
item.dc:creator: zakirsajib
item.description:
thats shame. you don’t know what is a sticky post. Strange.

Read full topic
item.source: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists

item.title: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists
item.dc:creator: mmczaplinski
item.description:
Hi @vimalkodoth

I’m afraid that this is not enough information for a frontity team member or a community member to assist you effectively. Please put some effort into explaining your use case and what you are trying to achieve. In particular, try to explain what you mean by “sticky posts” what is the “list” that you are talking about.

Ideally, you would also provide a github repository and explain the approach that you have tried and why it hasn’t worked.

Cheers

Read full topic
item.source: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists

item.title: Ways to display sticky posts on top within the lists
item.dc:creator: vimalkodoth
item.description:
Hi,
I’m using mars theme as base. I would like to display sticky posts on top of the list. As we have pagination, how would i get the sticky posts ?

Vimal Madhavan
